description: Harden and unify v13 isometric math by fixing projection, offset, placement, and sorting inconsistencies, while adding a robust automated test matrix.

userStories.title: Create shared math fixtures and tolerance helpers for tests
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want reusable numeric fixtures and float-comparison helpers so math tests are consistent and easy to extend.
acceptanceCriteria: Add reusable fixtures for projection type, token dimensions, grid size/distance, offsets, and elevation values.
Add a shared tolerance helper for floating-point assertions.
At least one existing/new test suite consumes the shared fixtures and helper.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Fix axis-scale token placement math
userStories.description: As a GM using rectangular tokens, I want placement formulas to use the correct axis scale so token art does not drift.
acceptanceCriteria: Token placement formulas use axis-correct scaling for both center and projected offsets.
Rectangular token cases (2x1, 1x2, 3x2) are covered by automated tests.
Square-token baseline behavior remains unchanged in default projection.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add numeric guards for division-sensitive formulas
userStories.description: As a GM, I want invalid numeric inputs (including grid distance zero) handled safely so transforms never produce NaN or Infinity.
acceptanceCriteria: Division-sensitive transform formulas have zero/invalid-denominator guards.
Guard behavior is explicit (fallback value or early return) and documented in code comments where non-obvious.
Unit tests validate guard behavior for grid distance 0 and non-finite inputs.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Unify transform and ruler offset/elevation projection logic
userStories.description: As a player measuring movement, I want ruler labels and transformed tokens to use consistent offset math so labels align with visuals.
acceptanceCriteria: Transform and ruler modules use one shared helper path for offset/elevation projection.
Equivalent inputs produce matching projected coordinates within configured tolerance.
Integration tests assert transform/ruler equivalence for multiple token shapes and offsets.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Stabilize depth sorting reference semantics
userStories.description: As a GM, I want front/back ordering to match rendered visuals for scaled and offset tokens so overlaps are deterministic.
acceptanceCriteria: Sorting uses a documented visual reference strategy appropriate for transformed tokens.
Scaled and offset overlap scenarios do not invert expected front/back ordering.
Integration tests cover movement and overlap ordering cases under isometric transforms.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Implement projection-aware conversion helpers including custom projection
userStories.description: As a world builder using custom projection values, I want coordinate conversion helpers to reflect active projection settings for consistent math behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Coordinate conversion helpers are projection-aware and use active projection constants.
Custom projection values are reflected in conversion outputs used by dependent features.
Unit tests validate forward/inverse behavior across required projection presets.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Automate the required math matrix core combinations
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want automated coverage of the core matrix dimensions so projection and transform regressions are detected quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Automated tests cover matrix core combinations for projection, token shape, grid config, offsets, and elevation.
Matrix assertions include finite outputs, transform/ruler equivalence, sorting stability, and custom projection effect.
Matrix test output clearly identifies failing dimension combinations.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Document manual visual matrix checklist for release validation
userStories.description: As a release maintainer, I want a manual visual checklist for high-risk scenarios so final behavior can be confirmed in-browser.
acceptanceCriteria: A manual matrix checklist is added/updated with projection mode, rectangular token, offset/elevation, and sorting overlap scenarios.
Checklist has explicit pass/fail steps and expected outcomes.
Release docs reference this checklist as required validation evidence.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
